mapper.select:
select p.post_id, p.member_id, p.place_id, p.title, p.content, p.created_at, p.updated_at, p.readcount, p.category, m.nickname as nickname from post p join member m on p.member_id = m.member_id
and p.category = #{category}
and (p.title like concat('%', #{q}, '%') or m.nickname like concat('%', #{q}, '%'))
order by p.post_id desc

select p.post_id, p.member_id, p.place_id, p.title, p.content, p.created_at, p.updated_at, p.readcount, p.category, m.nickname as nickname from post p join member m on p.member_id = m.member_id where p.post_id = #{postId}
mapper.update: update post set readcount = readcount + 1 where post_id = #{postId}
mapper.insert: insert into post (member_id, place_id, title, content, category) values (#{memberId}, #{placeId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{category})
mapper.update: update post set title= #{title}, content= #{content}, category = #{category} where post_id = #{postId}
mapper.insert: insert into image (post_id, image_url, sort_order) values (#{postId}, #{imageUrl}, #{sortOrder})
mapper.select:
select c.comment_id, c.content, c.depth, c.created_at, c.updated_at, c.parent_id, c.post_id, c.member_id, m.nickname as member_name from comment c join member m on c.member_id = m.member_id where c.post_id = #{postId} order by coalesce(c.parent_id, c.comment_id) asc,
c.parent_id is not null,
c.comment_id asc
mapper.insert: insert into comment (content, depth, parent_id, post_id, member_id) values (#{content}, #{depth}, #{parentId}, #{postId}, #{memberId})
